manuscript_delayed_background_statement.recommended_treatment: Report delayed activation as an unresolved cross-code model systematic; keep the headline as a reference-model estimate and include both delayed values in validation/systematics context.

boundary_margin_audit.boundary: Static boundary-margin audit only; runtime point-location and stopping/annihilation location remain open.
boundary_margin_audit.interpretation: Static source-boundary margin <0.01 cm contributes only 0.13 of net W2 raw difference; pure boundary-proximity explanation is weak.

phase3_cu64_crosscode_gate.interpretation: The W2 composition residual is best explained by local full-geometry Cu raw coupling: source-volume-specific and sign-changing, with MEGAlib gamma phot/compt ancestry feeding TES-local electrons. FLUKA incident TES ancestry remains to be measured with a boundary/ancestry scorer.

interpretation.mechanism: source-volume-specific full-geometry raw coupling before common detector response
remaining_needed: runtime point-location scorer in dominant source volumes

parent_history_event_builder.boundary: Common parent-history event builder only; sub-event time splitting and side-Compton/FoV topology remain open.
parent_history_event_builder.first_failed_phase: full-geometry raw-deposit/source-material coupling before common detector response

raw_coupling_decomposition.boundary: Decomposition of existing raw truth only; no new transport and no runtime point-location/stopping locator.
raw_coupling_decomposition.interpretation: W2 raw excess is distributed across source volumes/materials; not isolated to CuNi or non-neutron production.

raw_production_1e6.boundary: Production raw-deposit gate only; full raw truth is local/ignored and committed outputs are bounded summaries.

time_topology_event_builder.boundary: Common time/topology event builder over existing independent Cu-64 raw deposits; final side-Compton/FoV reconstruction remains open.
time_topology_event_builder.interpretation: Parent-history and 1 microsecond W2 results are identical; 1 nanosecond clustering only shifts a small MEGAlib active-veto tail and does not remove the W2 excess.

scope: independent-source FLUKA prompt+delayed energy-band statistics with TES Step05 comparison
